chunks.title: Genealogy of Judah and Caleb
chunks.reason: A continuous list of descendants from Judah through Shobal, Hur, and Caleb.

chunks.title: Descendants of Mered and Simeon
chunks.reason: Continues the genealogical record focusing on Mered's family and the early Simeonite settlements.

chunks.title: Genealogy of Simeon
chunks.reason: A detailed list of Simeon's lineage and their cities in the Negev.

chunks.title: Simeonites Conquer Gedor
chunks.reason: Narrative of leaders from Simeon moving to Gedor and defeating the Hamites under Hezekiah.

chunks.title: Simeonites Conquer Mount Seir
chunks.reason: Account of five hundred men from Simeon defeating the Amalekites in Mount Seir.
